preflight.note: Stamped by `repopact new`; the work item was recorded before implementation began.

acceptance_criteria.text: A versioned adopter manifest declares every known adopter repository, default branch, consumption model, version locator, and repository-native validation command; duplicate local checkouts resolve to one remote identity.

A deterministic, locally runnable fleet-verification command compares the current RepoPact release with every declared adopter's public default-branch version and remote head, fails closed on drift or an unreachable declaration, and reports discoverable unregistered candidates separately.

Fleet verification models exact PyPI pins and vendored consumers separately; vendored consumers prove the upstream base by checksums or an equivalently reviewable overlay so changing a version marker alone cannot assert parity.

Release closeout records package publication and downstream rollout as separate phases and cannot report ecosystem completion until every declared adopter passes fleet verification, without depending on GitHub Actions availability.
Tests cover current, stale, missing, unreachable, duplicate-remote, PyPI-pin, and vendored-drift cases; governance validation, unit tests, conformance, and the fleet command pass.
